languages.text: Единственным сохранившим верность династии подразделением остался 32-ой меровский полк, которым руководил лично архмилитант Иждриг Батошски.
The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.
languages.original_text: Единственным сохранившим верность династии подразделением остался 32-ой меровский полк, которым руководил лично архмилитант Иждриг Батошски.

traits.locale_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.
The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.
The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

languages.text: 王朝に忠誠を誓った唯一の部隊は、アーチ・ミリタント・イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーが率いる32番目のメロフ連隊だった。
languages.original_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

traits.locale_text: 王朝に忠誠を誓った唯一の部隊は、アーチ・ミリタント・イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーが率いる32番目のメロフ連隊だった。

languages.text: 唯一对王朝保持忠诚的部队，是首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基亲自率领的梅罗夫第32团。
languages.original_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

traits.locale_text: 唯一对王朝保持忠诚的部队，是首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基亲自率领的梅罗夫第32团。

languages.text: La seule unité qui resta loyale à la dynastie était le 32e régiment de Merov, mené personnellement par l'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski.
languages.original_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

traits.locale_text: La seule unité qui resta loyale à la dynastie était le 32e régiment de Merov, mené personnellement par l'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski.

languages.text: La única unidad que permaneció leal a la dinastía fue el 32.º regimiento de Merov, liderado personalmente por el Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski.
languages.original_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

traits.locale_text: La única unidad que permaneció leal a la dinastía fue el 32.º regimiento de Merov, liderado personalmente por el Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski.

languages.text: Hanedanlığa sadık kalan tek birim, Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski'nin bizzat yönettiği 32. Merov Alayı idi.
languages.original_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlığa sadık kalan tek birim, Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski'nin bizzat yönettiği 32. Merov Alayı idi.

languages.text: Die einzige Einheit, die der Dynastie die Treue hielt, war das 32. Merov-Regiment unter dem Befehl von Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski.
languages.original_text: The only unit that remained loyal to the dynasty was the 32nd Merov Regiment, led personally by Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski.

traits.locale_text: Die einzige Einheit, die der Dynastie die Treue hielt, war das 32. Merov-Regiment unter dem Befehl von Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski.
